= Johnny "the Cryptid" =

{{CharacterInfobox
| name        = Johnny "the Cryptid"
| portrait    = https://foundry.atkennedy.com/assets/Images/Tokens/Lizard_Gunner-Portrait_1.png?1779470232498
| level       = 8
| size        = Medium
| hp          = 0/0
| ac          = 25
| perception  = +16
| speed       = 25 ft.
| fortitude   = +14
| reflex      = +16
| will        = +14
| attributes  = '''STR''' +3 | '''DEX''' +4 | '''CON''' +2 | '''INT''' -1 | '''WIS''' +4 | '''CHA''' +1
| key_ability  = STR
| age          = 23
| gender       = He/Him
| hero_points  = 0
| wealth      = 766 GP, 2 SP, 74 CP
| last_kill   = Greykor (2026-06-01)
| last_downed = Vewslog (2026-06-15)
}}

== Details ==
* '''Ancestry:''' Lizardfolk
* '''Heritage:''' <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/ancestry/half-orc.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Dromaar" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Dromaar
* '''Background:''' Ratted-Out Gun Runner
* '''Class:''' <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/classes/ranger.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Ranger" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Ranger
* '''Key Ability:''' STR
* '''XP:''' 921

== Identity ==
* '''Age:''' 23
* '''Height:''' 6'0"
* '''Weight:''' 178
* '''Ethnicity:''' Isgeri
* '''Nationality:''' Alkenstar

== Personality & Beliefs ==
; '''Attitude'''
: unsanctimonious
; '''Edicts'''
: Clear his name, maintain, or return to respect with authorities... or regain their ignorance.

Live unimpeded by consequences for his actions or lifestyle.

Fulfill base desires. He sees money as the primary means to this end.

Kill devils, get rid of other "lawful" planar creatures.
; '''Anathema'''
: Harm innocents for no reason, other than if his life depends on it.

Be ruled or controlled by an authoritarian entity.

Making or honoring deals with the untrustworthy.

Spending long periods of time in fear of the powerful.

== Appearance ==
Orcish body with Iruxi head and scales, an amalgamation of both races. Has green scaly skin and long greasy slicked back black hair.

== Biography ==
Alias: Johnny

Real Name: Uldrak

Born in Isger he was a son of an Orcish adventurer who retired when he met an Iruxi woman. Both became merchants and ran a shop in town. His unusual birth and childhood resulted in a very chaotic minded individual, never learning anything without repercussions. And then only learning to avoid them by retreating into the wilderness until trouble went away. Out there he met some priests to the god Sobek, living off the swampy lands he had grown accustomed to. He respected their ways and virtues, leading him to one day maybe embrace them as a part of his life.

One day as a teen he stole some alchemical materials from a local Hobgoblin run candy store, called Kruglug's Candy Consortium, that was actually a front for a gang. This gang's purpose was funneling alchemy, alchemical weapons, and various banned items across Golarian especially into chaotic (and profitable) areas. As punishment they demanded he work for them and found that he was quite excellent at smuggling. Over the years he was given more tasks eventually ending up in running guns to Alkenstar, being the main contact and the leader of the smuggling operation in the city for his organization.

This led to conflict with the locals, resulting in him being ratted out with the shieldmarshals. He escaped arrest and now is on the run. (see background)

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>⚔ Defense & Saves</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
* '''HP:''' 0/0
* '''AC:''' 25
* '''Perception:''' +16 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Speed:''' 25 ft. (land)
* '''Fortitude:''' +14 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Reflex:''' +16 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Will:''' +14 ({{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}})
* '''Active Conditions:''' Dying 4, Prone, Blinded, Unconscious
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>📊 Ability Scores</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width:100%;"
|-
! STR !! DEX !! CON !! INT !! WIS !! CHA
|-
| +3 || +4 || +2 || -1 || +4 || +1
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎓 Skills</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;"
! Skill !! Modifier !! Proficiency
|-
| Acrobatics || +4 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Alkenstar || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Arcana || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Athletics || +13 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Crafting || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Deception || +13 || {{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}}
|-
| Diplomacy || +11 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Firearm || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Intimidation || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Medicine || +4 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Nature || +14 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Occultism || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Performance || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Religion || +14 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Society || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Stealth || +14 || {{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}}
|-
| Survival || +16 || {{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}}
|-
| Thievery || +18 || {{color|#8a2be2|'''Master'''}}
|-
| Underworld || -1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>💰 Wealth & Carry</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable"
! Coin !! Total Value !! Bulk !! Invested
|-
| 766 GP, 2 SP, 74 CP || 766.94 gp || 265.5 / 8 enc / 13 max || 0/10
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>✨ Feats & Features</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Heritage=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/ancestry/half-orc.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Dromaar" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Dromaar''' <small>(dromaar)</small>
: Orcish strength emboldens your bloodline. You have a green tinge to your skin and other indicators of orc heritage. You gain the orc trait, the dromaar trait, and low-light vision. When you gain an ancestry feat, you can choose from dromaar and orc feats in addition to those from your ancestry.

=====Background Features=====
; '''Ratted-Out Gun Runner'''
: Sure, you've got a checkered past. Who doesn't? It's hard to make a living in the City of Smog, so you did what you could to put silvers in your pocket and food on the table. You made a good deal of money selling firearms from the Gunworks to people who perhaps shouldn't have had them. You even worked with wasteland marauders a few times, sticking up Ustradi barges plying the river between the Gunworks and Alkenstar. Of course, you never hurt any innocents or did anything truly heinous; your criminal career was always just a matter of money.

One day, a corrupt financier named Ambrost Mugland-a true crook if there ever was one-approached you, demanding a cut of your business. When you refused, he put in a word with the shieldmarshals that you'd be a certain somewhere at a certain time with a certain large quantity of illegally obtained firearms. Even though you escaped arrest, your identity was compromised, and your old accomplices have all turned their backs on you. Your gun-running days are clearly over. Now, you're just running.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to '''Dexterity''' or '''Wisdom''', and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Stealth skill and the Firearm Lore skill. You gain the Experienced Smuggler skill feat.

=====Feats=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Additional Lore" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Additional Lore''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: Your knowledge has expanded to encompass a new field. Choose a Lore skill subcategory. You become trained in it. At 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels, you gain an additional skill increase you can apply only to the chosen Lore subcategory.

'''Special''' You can select this feat more than once. Each time you must select a new subcategory of Lore and you gain the additional skill increases to that subcategory for the listed levels.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Adopted Ancestry (Human)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Adopted Ancestry (Human)''' <small>(general)</small>
: You're fully immersed in another ancestry's culture and traditions, whether born into them, earned through rite of passage, or bonded through a deep friendship or romance. Choose a common ancestry or another ancestry to which you have access. You can select ancestry feats from the ancestry you chose, in addition to your character's own ancestry, as long as the ancestry feats don't require any physiological feature that you lack, as determined by the GM.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Alkenstar Agent Dedication" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Alkenstar Agent Dedication''' <small>(archetype, dedication)</small>
: '''Access''' You have been initiated by the grand duchess of Alkenstar or one of her agents.

You put on the persona of a rough and tumble outlaw, but your real goals are to report threats to Alkenstar back to the grand duchess. You become an expert in Deception and trained in your choice of Underworld Lore or Legal Lore; if you were already trained, you become an expert instead. You gain the Lie to Me skill feat.

'''Special''' You can't select another dedication feat until you've gained two other feats from the Alkenstar Agent archetype.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/ancestry//aquatic-adaptation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Aquatic Adaptation" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Aquatic Adaptation''' <small>(lizardfolk)</small>
: Your reptilian biology allows you to hold your breath for a long time. You gain the Breath Control general feat as a bonus feat.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Basic Cleric Spellcasting" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Basic Cleric Spellcasting''' <small>(archetype)</small>
: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits. You can prepare your deity's spells in your spell slots of the appropriate rank from the cleric archetype.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Basic Dogma" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Basic Dogma''' <small>(archetype)</small>
: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level cleric feat.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Breath Control" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Breath Control''' <small>(general)</small>
: You can breathe even in hazardous or sparse air. You can hold your breath for 25 times as long as usual before suffocating. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against inhaled threats, such as inhaled poisons, and if you roll a success on such a saving throw, you get a critical success instead.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/ancestry/claws.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Claws" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Claws''' <small>(lizardfolk)</small>
: Your sharp claws offer an alternative to the fists other humanoids bring to a fight. You have a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage and has the agile and finesse traits.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Cleric Dedication" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Cleric Dedication''' <small>(archetype, dedication, multiclass)</small>
: You cast spells like a cleric. You gain the Cast a Spell activity. You can prepare two common cantrips each day from the divine spell list or any other divine cantrips you have access to. You're trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics. Your key spellcasting attribute for cleric archetype spells is Wisdom, and they are divine cleric spells. Choose a deity as you would if you were a cleric. You become bound by that deity's anathema and can receive that deity's divine sanctification. You become trained in Religion and your deity's associated skill; for each of these skills in which you were already trained, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of deity.

'''Special''' You cannot select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the Cleric archetype.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/classes/deity.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Deity (Cleric)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Deity (Cleric)''' <small>(cleric)</small>
: As a cleric, you are a mortal servitor of a deity you revere above all others. Your deity grants you the trained proficiency rank in one skill and with the deity's favored weapon. If the favored weapon is uncommon, you also get access to that weapon.

Your deity also adds spells to your spell list. You can prepare these just like you can any spell on the divine spell list once you can prepare spells of their rank as a cleric. Any of these spells that aren't normally on the divine list are still divine spells if you prepare them this way.

=== Sanctification ===

Depending on your deity, their sanctification can make you holy or unholy. This gives you the holy or unholy trait, which commits you to one side of a struggle over the souls of the planes and may be referenced in other abilities. If you "can be" holy or unholy according to your deity, you make that choice, and if you "must be" holy or unholy you gain the trait automatically. If you gain the opposing trait in some way, you lose the previous trait until you complete an atone ritual.

=== Anathema ===

Acts fundamentally opposed to your deity's ideals are anathema to your faith. Learning or casting spells, committing acts, and using items that are anathema to your deity remove you from your deity's good graces.

Casting spells with the unholy trait is almost always anathema to deities who don't allow unholy sanctification, and casting holy spells is likewise anathema to those who don't allow holy sanctification. Similarly, casting spells that are anathema to the tenets or goals of your faith could interfere with your connection to your deity. For example, casting a spell to create undead would be anathema to Pharasma, the goddess of death. Many actions that are anathema don't appear in any deity's formal list. For borderline cases, you and your GM determine which acts are anathema.

If you perform enough acts that are anathema to your deity, you lose the magical abilities that come from your connection to your deity. The class features that you lose are determined by the GM, but they likely include your divine font and all cleric spellcasting. These abilities can be regained only if you repent by conducting an atone ritual.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Divine Breadth" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Divine Breadth''' <small>(archetype)</small>
: As your understanding increases, your god grants you more divine spells each day. Increase the spell slots you gain from cleric archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest cleric spell slots.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Domain Initiate (Dragon)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Domain Initiate (Dragon)''' <small>(cleric)</small>
: Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers. Select one domain—a subject of particular interest to you within your religion—from your deity's list. You gain an initial domain spell for that domain, a spell unique to the domain and not available to other clerics.

Domain spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to pray to your deity or do service toward their causes.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and can't be cast using spell slots. Your focus pool can hold one Focus Point for each focus spell you have, up to 3 points.

'''Special''' You can select this feat multiple times, selecting a different domain each time and gaining its domain spell.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Experienced Smuggler" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Experienced Smuggler''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You often smuggle things past the authorities. When the GM rolls your Stealth check to see if a passive observer notices a small item you've Concealed, the GM uses the number rolled or 10—whichever is higher—as the result of your die roll, adding it to your Stealth modifier to determine your Stealth check result. If you're a master in Stealth, the GM uses the number rolled or 15, and if you're legendary in Stealth, you automatically succeed at hiding a small concealed item from passive observers. This provides no benefits when a creature attempts a Perception check while actively searching you for Hidden items.

'''PFS Note''' This feat allows you to Earn Income with Underworld Lore with tasks of your level -1 (instead of the normal level -2).
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Experienced Tracker" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Experienced Tracker''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: Tracking is second nature to you, and when necessary you can follow a trail without pause. You can Track while moving at full Speed by taking a –5 penalty to your Survival check. If you're a master in Survival, you don't take the –5 penalty. If you're legendary in Survival, you no longer need to roll a new Survival check every hour when tracking, though you still need to roll whenever there are significant changes in the trail.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/skills/melee/strike-polearm-light-orange.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Flurry" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Flurry''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: You have trained to unleash a devastating flurry of attacks upon your prey. Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against your hunted prey is –3 (–2 with an agile weapon) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –6 (–4 with an agile weapon) on your third or subsequent attack of the turn, instead of –10.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/creatures/eyes/humanoid-single-red-brown.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Hunt Prey" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Hunt Prey''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: When you focus your attention on a single foe, you become unstoppable in your pursuit. You gain the Hunt Prey action.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Hunted Shot" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Hunted Shot''' <small>(flourish, ranger)</small>
: '''Requirements''' You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0.

You take two quick shots against the one you hunt. Make two Strikes against your prey with the required weapon. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Apply your multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/symbols/question-stone-yellow.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Hunter's Edge" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Hunter's Edge''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: You have trained to become a skilled hunter and tracker, gaining an extra benefit when you Hunt Prey depending on the focus of your training. Choose a hunter's edge.

* Flurry

* Outwit

* Precision
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Incredible Initiative" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Incredible Initiative''' <small>(general)</small>
: You react more quickly than others can. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Initiate Warden" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Initiate Warden''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: You've trained with one of the ranger sects known as wardens, who practice a specialized type of primal magic. You gain your choice of one warden spell from these initial warden spells (or another you have access to).

Gravity Weapon

Heal Companion

Magic Hide

'''Special''' You can take this feat multiple times, choosing a different initial warden spell each time.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Lie to Me" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Lie to Me''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You can use Deception to weave traps to trip up anyone trying to deceive you. If you can engage in conversation with someone trying to Lie to you, use your Deception DC if it is higher than your Perception DC to determine whether they succeed. This doesn't apply if you don't have a back-and-forth dialogue, such as when someone attempts to Lie during a long speech.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Natural Ambition" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Natural Ambition''' <small>(human)</small>
: You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field. You gain a 1st-level class feat for your class. You must meet the prerequisites, but you can select the feat later in the character creation process in order to determine which prerequisites you meet.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/symbols/symbol-lightning-bolt.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Natural Reflexes" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Natural Reflexes''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: You've honed your reflexes dodging falling trees and pounding hail. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Orc Weapon Familiarity" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Orc Weapon Familiarity''' <small>(orc)</small>
: In combat, you favor the brutal weapons that are traditional for your orc ancestors. You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the orc trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the orc trait plus the falchion and greataxe—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/perception/eye-tendrils-web-purple.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Perception Mastery" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Perception Mastery''' <small>(barbarian, bard, commander, exemplar, gunslinger, investigator, ranger, rogue, swashbuckler, thaumaturge)</small>
: '''Barbarian''' Your instinct heightens each of your senses further. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

'''Bard, Gunslinger, Rogue''' You've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

'''Commander''' You've developed the ability to see a scenario from every side. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

'''Exemplar''' Through your adventures, you've developed keen awareness and attention to detail, the better to watch over your wards and keep an eye out for monsters and other threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

'''Investigator, Swashbuckler, Thaumaturge''' Through your adventures, you've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

'''Ranger''' You have highly developed acuity and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Quick Unlock" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Quick Unlock''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: You can Pick a Lock using 1 action instead of 2.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/skills/melee/hand-grip-sword-red.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Ranger Weapon Expertise" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Ranger Weapon Expertise''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: You gain every advantage from your weapons. Your proficiency rank for martial weapons, simple weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to expert. You gain access to the critical specialization effects of all such weapons and unarmed attacks when attacking your hunted prey.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/books/book-red-exclamation.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Subtle Theft" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Subtle Theft''' <small>(general, skill)</small>
: When you successfully Steal something, observers (creatures other than the creature you stole from) take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Perception DCs to detect your theft. Additionally, if you first Create a Diversion using Deception, taking a single Palm an Object or Steal action doesn't end your Undetected condition.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/nature/root-vine-entangle-foot-green.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Trackless Journey" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Trackless Journey''' <small>(ranger)</small>
: When you move through natural terrains, you are hard to track. You always gain the benefits of the Cover Tracks action in such terrains, without moving at half your Speed.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/classes/weapon-specialization.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Weapon Specialization" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Weapon Specialization''' <small>(alchemist, animist, bard, champion, cleric, commander, druid, fighter, gunslinger, inventor, investigator, kineticist, ranger, rogue, sorcerer, summoner, swashbuckler, witch, wizard)</small>
: You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal an additional 2 damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you are an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/features/classes/walls-of-will.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Will Expertise" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Will Expertise''' <small>(alchemist, kineticist, ranger)</small>
: Your mental defenses grow stronger. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to expert.

=====Actions=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/Passive.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Avoid Notice" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Avoid Notice''' <small>(exploration)</small>
: You attempt a Stealth check to avoid notice while traveling at half speed. If you're Avoiding Notice at the start of an encounter, you usually roll a Stealth check instead of a Perception check both to determine your initiative and to see if the enemies notice you (based on their Perception DCs, as normal for Sneak, regardless of their initiative check results).
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/OneAction.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Hunt Prey" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Hunt Prey''' <small>(concentrate, ranger)</small>
: You designate a single creature as your prey and focus your attacks against that creature. You must be able to see or hear the prey, or you must be tracking the prey during exploration.

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks when you Seek your prey and a +2 circumstance bonus to Survival checks when you Track your prey. You also ignore the penalty for making ranged attacks within your second range increment against the prey you're hunting.

You can have only one creature designated as your prey at a time. If you use Hunt Prey against a creature when you already have a creature designated, the prior creature loses the designation and the new prey gains the designation. Your designation lasts until your next daily preparations.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/Passive.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Investigate" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Investigate''' <small>(concentrate, exploration)</small>
: You seek out information about your surroundings while traveling at half speed. You use Recall Knowledge as a secret check to discover clues among the various things you can see and engage with as you journey along. You can use any skill that has a Recall Knowledge action while Investigating, but the GM determines whether the skill is relevant to the clues you could find.
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/Passive.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Scout" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Scout''' <small>(concentrate, exploration)</small>
: You scout ahead and behind the group to watch danger, moving at half speed. At the start of the next encounter, every creature in your party gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls.

Effect: Scout
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/actions/Passive.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Search" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Search''' <small>(concentrate, exploration)</small>
: You Seek meticulously for hidden doors, concealed hazards, and so on. You can usually make an educated guess as to which locations are best to check and move at half speed, but if you want to be thorough and guarantee you checked everything, you need to travel at a Speed of no more than 300 feet per minute, or 150 feet per minute to ensure you check everything before you walk into it. You can always move more slowly while Searching to cover the area more thoroughly, and the Expeditious Search feat increases these maximum Speeds. If you come across a secret door, item, or hazard while Searching, the GM will attempt a free secret check to Seek to see if you notice the hidden object or hazard. In locations with many objects to search, you have to stop and spend significantly longer to search thoroughly.

</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎒 Inventory</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Weapons=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/guns/gun-worn-gold.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Barricade Buster" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Barricade Buster]] || 1 || 3 || 1 || 9 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/worn-items/other-worn-items/handwraps-of-mighty-blows.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Handwraps of Mighty Blows" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Handwraps of Mighty Blows]] || 1 || 0 || 2 || 35 gp
|}

=====Armor & Shields=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/armor/padded-armor.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="+1 Padded Armor" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[+1 Padded Armor]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 35 gp
|}

=====Consumables=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/consumables/potions/bottle-round-corked-orante-red.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Healing Potion (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Healing Potion (Lesser)]] || 4 || 0.1 || 3 || 12 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/consumables/potions/bottle-round-ring-teal.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Invisibility Potion" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Invisibility Potion]] || 0 || 0.1 || 4 || 20 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/wands/magic-wands/magic-wand.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Wand of Heal (Level 1)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Wand of Heal (Level 1)]] || 1 || 0.1 || 3 || 60 gp
|}

=====Ammunition=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/shot-round-silver.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Magazine with 8 Pellets" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Magazine with 8 Pellets]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 6 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/shot-round-silver.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Magazine with 8 Pellets" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Magazine with 8 Pellets]] || 1 || 0.1 || 0 || 6 sp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/shot-round-silver.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Magazine with 8 Pellets" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Magazine with 8 Pellets]] || 10 || 0.1 || 0 || 6 sp
|}

=====Equipment=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/worn-items/other-worn-items/aeon-stone-pearly-white-spindle.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Aeon Stone (Pearly White Spindle)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Aeon Stone (Pearly White Spindle)]] || 1 || 0 || 3 || 60 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/worn-items/other-worn-items/clockwork-heels.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Clockwork Heels" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Clockwork Heels]] || 1 || 0.1 || 7 || 300 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/everburning-torch.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Everburning Torch" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Everburning Torch]] || 1 || 0.1 || 1 || 15 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/tech/tube-chamber-lightning.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Jolt Coil" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Jolt Coil]] || 1 || 0 || 3 || 60 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/neck/handkerchief-bandana-blue.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Masquerade Scarf" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Masquerade Scarf]] || 1 || 0 || 2 || 30 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/lockpicks-steel-grey.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Thieves' Toolkit (Infiltrator)]] || 1 || 0.1 || 3 || 50 gp
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/worn-items/other-worn-items/wayfinder.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Wayfinder" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Wayfinder]] || 1 || 0 || 2 || 28 gp
|}

=====Bags & Storage=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/bag-of-holding.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Bag of Holding (Type I)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Bag of Holding (Type I)]] || 1 || 1 || 4 || 75 gp
|-
| colspan="6" |
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-elixirs/drakeheart-mutagen.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Drakeheart Mutagen (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Drakeheart Mutagen (Lesser)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/scrolls/scroll-symbol-eye-brown.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Scroll of Heal (Rank 2)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Scroll of Heal (Rank 2)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-elixirs/elixir-of-life.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Elixir of Life (Minor)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Elixir of Life (Minor)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/lockpicks-steel-grey.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/gems/gem-faceted-hexagon-blue.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Small Sapphires" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Small Sapphires ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/thieves-tools.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Thieves' Tools" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Thieves' Tools
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/lockpicks-steel-grey.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Thieves' Tools" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Thieves' Tools
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/other-consumables/golden-silencer.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Golden Silencer (Standard)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Golden Silencer (Standard)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/metal/ingot-gold.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Gold Statue of a Chimera with the Head of a lion, Elephant and Gifaffe" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Gold Statue of a Chimera with the Head of a lion, Elephant and Gifaffe
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/tools/hand/lockpicks-steel-grey.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Thieves' Tools" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Thieves' Tools
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/other/attached-items/scope.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Magnifying Scope" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Magnifying Scope
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/runes/weapon-property-runes/weapon-property-runes.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Shock" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Shock
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/runes/fundamental-weapon-runes/weapon-potency.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Weapon Potency (+1)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Weapon Potency (+1) ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/alchemists-fire.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Alchemist's Fire (Lesser) ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/silver-pieces.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Silver Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Silver Pieces ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-bombs/bottled-lightning.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Bottled Lightning (Moderate)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Bottled Lightning (Moderate) ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/magnifying-glass.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Magnifying Glass" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Magnifying Glass
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/other-consumables/holy-water.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Holy Water" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Holy Water ×2
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/talismans/snapleaf.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Snapleaf" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Snapleaf
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/endless-grimoire.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Endless Grimoire" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Endless Grimoire
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/shot-round-silver.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Magazine with 8 Pellets" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Magazine with 8 Pellets ×20
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/runes/fundamental-weapon-runes/striking.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Striking" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Striking ×3
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/other-consumables/golden-silencer.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Golden Silencer (Standard)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Golden Silencer (Standard)
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/bags/pack-leather-white-tan.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Backpack" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Backpack'''
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/survival/rope-wrapped-brown.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Rope" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Rope
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/creatures/slimes/slime-bubble-teal.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Astral Goo" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Astral Goo
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/tech/pipe-tin.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Weapon Siphon" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Weapon Siphon
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/documents/envelope-sealed-red-tan.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Dresh's Encoded Ledger" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Dresh's Encoded Ledger
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-elixirs/drakeheart-mutagen.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Drakeheart Mutagen (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Drakeheart Mutagen (Lesser)
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/stone/geode-raw-tan.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Flint and Steel" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Flint and Steel
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/cartographers-kit.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Crude map of Alkenstar sewers" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Crude map of Alkenstar sewers
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/commodities/materials/feather-blue.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Feather Token (Chest)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Feather Token (Chest)
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/bomb-launcher.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Net Launcher" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Net Launcher
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/rations.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Rations" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Rations ×2
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/chalk.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Chalk" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Chalk ×10
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/grappling-gun.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Grappling Gun" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Grappling Gun
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/net.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Net" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Net ×6
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/grapling-hook.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Grappling Hook" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Grappling Hook
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/survival/soap.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Soap" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Soap
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/waterskin.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Waterskin" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Waterskin
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/adventuring-gear/thieves-tools.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Thieves' Tools (Replacement Picks)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Thieves' Tools (Replacement Picks) ×3
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/bags/pack-leather-gold-pink.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Firearm Cleaning Kit" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Firearm Cleaning Kit
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/water/orb-ice-opaque.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Cooling Orb (1st Level Wand of Chilling Spray)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Cooling Orb (1st Level Wand of Chilling Spray)
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-poisons/hunting-spider-venom.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Hunting Spider Venom" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Hunting Spider Venom ×3
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/key-purple.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Manager's keys" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Manager's keys
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/held-items/wrist-grappler.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Wrist Grappler (Clockwork)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Wrist Grappler (Clockwork)
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/consumables/ammunition/shining-ammunition.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Shining Ammunition (Sling Bullets)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Shining Ammunition (Sling Bullets) ×3
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-elixirs/antidote.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Antidote (Lesser)" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Antidote (Lesser) ×5
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/equipment/chest/breastplate-scale-leather.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Leather Lamellar" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Leather Lamellar
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/containers/ammunition/quiver-simple-brown.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Bedroll" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Bedroll
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/sundries/lights/torch-brown.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Torch" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Torch ×5
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/alchemical-items/alchemical-tools/timeless-salts.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Timeless Salts" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Timeless Salts
** <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/copper-pieces.webp" width="16" height="16" alt="Copper Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Copper Pieces ×74
|}

=====Treasure & Currency=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/treasure/currency/gold-pieces.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Gold Pieces" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Gold Pieces]] || 166 || 1 || 0 || 1 gp
|}

</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🔮 Spellcasting</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Divine Focus Spells (Divine) — Focus=====

'''Rank 1'''
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/creatures/reptiles/dragon-winged-blue.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Draconic Barrage" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Draconic Barrage]] <small>[cleric, concentrate, focus, manipulate]</small>

=====Divine Prepared Spells (Divine) — Prepared=====

'''Rank 1''' <small>(0/2 slots)</small>
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/spells/lock.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Lock" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Lock]] <small>[concentrate, manipulate]</small>
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/spells/shield.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Shield" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Shield]] <small>[cantrip, concentrate, force]</small>
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/control/debuff-energy-hold-yellow.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Stabilize" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Stabilize]] <small>[cantrip, concentrate, healing, manipulate, vitality]</small>

=====Other Spells=====
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/spells/bless.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Bless" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Bless]]
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/lightning/bolt-strike-forked-blue.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Electric Arc" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Electric Arc]]
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/spells/fear.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Fear" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Fear]]
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/weapons/ammunition/arrowhead-glowing-blue.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Gravity Weapon" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Gravity Weapon]]
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/life/cross-worn-green.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Heal" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Heal]]
* <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/spells/light.webp" width="18" height="18" alt="Light" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> [[Light]]

</div>
</div>

''Last synced: 2026-06-20 01:33''
[[Category:Characters]]
